title: (Red) Panda Plushies!
description: Adds an adorable plush red panda friend to your game!
body: ### >ω< About **Panda Plushies!** is a mod that adds an adorable red panda plushie to the game! It also adds a bee plushie and a reindeer plushie! Snuggle your red panda friend. Place him down wherever. You can make your plushies sit or lie and you can also pet them by right-clicking! I hope you will enjoy your new plushie friends!! ### 📝 Notes Requires **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**. This mod is a fork of the mod **[Blåhaj Replushed](https://modrinth.com/mod/blahaj_fabric)** by ***[DaFuqs](https://modrinth.com/user/DaFuqs)*** which itself is a fork of the mod **[Blåhaj](https://modrinth.com/mod/blahaj)** by ***[hibi](https://modrinth.com/user/hibi)***. Go check them out, this mod wouldn't exist without them! ![A cute red panda staring at you.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VLpCVEoM/images/48c9c8b95562590611570021bbe67540808a05a6.png)
